free_text: The total cross section of Li-6 from 70 eV to 7 MeV
Time of flight, flight paths = 120 m and
300 m covering neutron energy ranges 70 eV to 100 keV
and 0.1 MeV to 7 MeV, respectively.  Time channel
Detected 478-keV gamma ray from B-10(n,alpha1 gamma).
Below 10 keV, the cross-sections are fitted to the
function   sig(tot) = C/(square root(E)) + B, where
Statistical error only, no further information.
Data and short comment from Uttley, 23/01/1974
